expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly addresses the focus: it states Phase 6 enforces “final layered structure” and “executable-step wording” and cites rubric/validators. Quotes: “Final Layering is defined explicitly…” and “The workflow includes `validate_executable_steps`…”, and “Confirmed benchmark focus is explicitly addressed in the Phase 6 rubric + phase gates.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: result.md is framed as a Phase 6 contract check and ties checks to Phase 6 artifacts and gates: “Primary phase under test: Phase 6”, and it lists Phase 6 required outputs (`drafts/qa_plan_phase6_r<round>.md`, `context/quality_delta_<feature-id>.md`, `phase6_spawn_manifest.json`) plus Phase 6 rubric sections and validators.
